title: Animated Cobblemon Doors Compat
description: A compatible Cobblemon Apricorn/Saccharine Door pack for Animated Doors.
body:
# ACDC - Animated Cobblemon Doors Compat
Visible the Apricorn/Saccharine Door when [Animated Doors](https://modrinth.com/datapack/animated-doors) by [Miraculixx](https://modrinth.com/user/Miraculixx) is installed.

**[Animated Doors](https://modrinth.com/datapack/animated-doors) is required to be installed and this pack must be placed above [Animated Doors RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-door).**

![Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068575b5fb304dc80cc31cad1e301d1e937888fe.png)

![1.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a387c036fc4b75cc5345d102ce046a69eaaf4cac.gif)

# Installation

## MOD VERSION CAN AUTO LOAD THE DATAPACK!

<details>
<summary>DATAPACK MANUAL INSTALL</summary>

After downloading the Datapack, be sure to put it in your "resources" folder and "datapack" folder within your world. _or you can use [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) by [JTK222](https://modrinth.com/user/JTK222) to load the datapack automatically._

</details>
